faq.question: How much does window replacement cost in Sunnyvale?
faq.answer: For Sunnyvale homes, with the current promotion quality vinyl replacement starts at $549 per window installed (regular $915), while fiberglass, clad-wood and architectural products price higher. Deluxe Windows itemizes product, labor and permits in a written Sunnyvale quote after free on-site measurements.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to replace windows in Sunnyvale?
faq.answer: Permitting: Sunnyvale follows standard California permitting, confirmed per project scope. Deluxe Windows verifies requirements with the building department and manages the paperwork for Sunnyvale installations.

faq.question: Which window brands work best for Sunnyvale homes?
faq.answer: Popular choices in Sunnyvale include Milgard, Anlin and Simonton vinyl for value, and Marvin or Andersen for premium projects. The right pick depends on the home's age, style and exposure in Sunnyvale.

faq.question: How long does window replacement take in Sunnyvale?
faq.answer: Most Sunnyvale projects are measured in one visit and installed in one to three working days once windows arrive, typically four to eight weeks after ordering.

faq.question: How do I book a free window replacement estimate in Sunnyvale?
faq.answer: Call or send the project details online and a Deluxe Windows consultant visits the Sunnyvale home, measures every opening and prepares a written installed quote — the visit is free and there is no obligation to order.
